title: Mob Dummys
description: A mod that makes dummy versions of some Minecraft mobs.
body:
# Mob Dummys

This mod adds dummy versions of some of Minecraft's hostile mobs such as
- Zomibe
- Husk
- Enderman
- Pillager
- Drowned
- Wither Skeleton
- Piglin

And a blank dummy version.  Check the gallery to see what the mobs look like!  The mobs also don't stick out their arms like the normal hostile mobs do.
